rationale: Query examples are realistic and use current APIs across all four platforms with idiomatic LiveCollection observe patterns, but error handling is present on only one platform (Swift) — Android, Flutter, and TypeScript examples omit failure paths.
suggestions: Add .onFailure / catch / onError handlers to the Android (Kotlin), Flutter (Dart), and TypeScript examples to reach score 5.
Add import statements to the Android and Flutter snippets — the Swift and TS examples have them but Kotlin/Dart don't.
